subject: Force-deploy + verify cb-injection (CB capital-injection & carry)

output.headline: Global CB impulse: NEUTRAL. Carry funding neutral, unwind risk MODERATE (20/100). ['Fed'] injecting; ['BOJ'] draining.
output.eurodollar_read: Mixed — no decisive central-bank liquidity impulse; watch the carry funding currencies for the next signal.

carry_trade.read: Carry funding conditions neutral; unwind risk moderate. A sharp move higher in the yen or franc, or a hawkish BOJ, is what forces a leveraged carry unwind.

central_banks.read: ECB balance sheet +0.5% over 6m, deposit facility rate 2.0% — neutral.
BOJ balance sheet -4.8% over 6m, short rate 1.26882% (+0.45pp/6m) — strong drain; the carry funding leg.
Fed balance sheet +2.2% over 6m (QT pace), funds rate 3.75% — strong injection.
SNB short rate -0.04% (+0.02pp/6m) — the franc is the second carry funding currency.

verdict: CB-INJECTION LIVE & VERIFIED — deployed, scheduled daily, computing per-CB injection stance for ECB/BOJ/Fed/SNB on real FRED data, with net global liquidity impulse and carry funding + unwind-risk synthesis. Eurodollar/carry coverage extended.
